title: RoseSky
description: RoseSky is a pink-themed sky overlay designed for Minecraft 1.8, adding a soft and aesthetic rose-colored atmosphere to your game.
body:
### What is this resource pack?
RoseSky is a pink-themed sky overlay that replaces the default Minecraft sky with a soft, rose-inspired aesthetic. It’s made for 1.8 and gives your game a fresh and calming look, perfect for PvP, building, or casual play.

### Requirements

- Needs OptiFine
- Custom Sky should be turned ON
- Stars / Sun and Moon should be turned ON

### How to use this resource pack?
This pack is compatible with all other resource packs. Just make sure to place it on top of the one you are already using in your resource pack order.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a31620fcd42a847410f51365c42fa0eb7c5ef94a.jpeg)
